metric_value: Collaborative best-of-breed: HP provides CCM plus partner ecosystem with single point of contact for CIS deployment
notes: Aberdeen identifies HP's partner umbrella strategy as differentiating characteristic

metric_value: Unique combination of advanced middleware + professional services + hardware + networking + partner software
notes: Aberdeen characterizes the solution as comprehensive rather than point-product

metric_name: HP market position for contact centers
metric_value: HP in excellent position to capitalize on integrated contact center mandate with Smart Contact
notes: Aberdeen's positive positioning assessment of HP in this market

metric_value: Integrated solutions centers increasingly viewed as critical piece in achieving highest customer service levels
notes: Aberdeen frames growing importance of contact centers as market context

metric_value: HP's CCM is the most important element; partner software integrated around HP's proprietary middleware layer
notes: Aberdeen identifies CCM as the architectural anchor of the Smart Contact solution

metric_value: HP takes collaborative approach combining best-of-breed partner software with its own CCM
notes: Key strategic choice: HP chose integration over pure build; recognized need for partners

metric_value: User organizations turning to HP when building customer-focused contact centers for competitive advantage
notes: Aberdeen implicitly predicts HP will be a major contact center vendor

metric_value: HP exited contact center software market in early 2000s; Smart Contact discontinued; HP restructured and divested software units
notes: The contact center market consolidated around Avaya, Genesys, Cisco — not HP. HP exited the space.

metric_value: HP split into HP Inc. (hardware/printing) and Hewlett Packard Enterprise (services/enterprise technology) in November 2015
notes: The Electronic Business Software Organization and Smart Contact were long gone by this point

metric_value: Organizations forging closer customer relationships must consistently provide highest levels of service and support
notes: Aberdeen articulates the business driver for contact center investment
